report.summary: Audited 2 new learn guides from today's build cycle (Solana Developer Platform SDP, Agentic Payments Protocols), created OG images for both, fixed StructuredData prop bugs on both pages, added cross-links to balance related articles grids.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed StructuredData component prop name on SDP page: changed 'schema' to 'data' to match component interface — structured data was silently not rendering
Fixed StructuredData component prop name on Agentic Payments page: changed 'schemas' to 'data' — same silent rendering failure
Fixed combineSchemas call on SDP page: was passing array-wrapped args ([articleSchema, faqSchema]) instead of spread args (articleSchema, faqSchema) — caused nested array in JSON-LD output
Added cross-link from SDP guide to Agentic Payments Protocols guide in Related Articles section — fills orphan 6th grid slot and connects thematically related content
Added cross-link from Agentic Payments guide to SDP guide in Related Articles section — fills orphan 6th grid slot for balanced 2-column layout
Both pages have proper article reading flow: badges, gradient title, meta info bar, stats bar, table of contents, content sections, disclaimer, related articles, BackToTop

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: solana-developer-platform-sdp-guide (1200x630 SVG) — features Solana purple-green gradient, API module diagram (Issuance/Payments/Trading), enterprise partner badges (Mastercard, Worldpay, Western Union), key stats (65K+ TPS, 20+ partners, sub-cent fees)

OG image: agentic-payments-protocols-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — features protocol stack diagram (x402, ERC-8183, ACP, AP2, Open Wallet Standard), agent-to-service payment flow illustration, key stats (5 protocols, 115M+ x402 txns, $5T+ market)

sections.title: Bugs Found & Fixed
items: CRITICAL: Both new pages had wrong prop names for StructuredData component — 'schema' and 'schemas' instead of 'data'. This means JSON-LD structured data was not rendering at all, hurting SEO rich snippet eligibility
SDP page combineSchemas called with array-wrapped arguments instead of rest params — would produce malformed JSON-LD with nested arrays
